sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_regions (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_regions VALUES (1, 'Region A'), (2, 'Region B'), (3, 'Region C');
SELECT regionToCountry(id) AS country_id, name FROM test_regions;
UPDATE test_regions SET id = regionToCountry(id) WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT regionToCountry(id) AS country_id, count(*) FROM test_regions GROUP BY country_id;
